mapper.sql: id, patient_id, patient_name, patient_phone, id_card, department_id, department_name, physician_id, physician_name, scheduling_id, visit_date, visit_time, complaint, status, register_type, regist_level_id, regist_level_name, amount, pay_status, pay_method, ai_triage_result, ai_pre_visit, operator_id, operator_name, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM register WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM register WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM register WHERE visit_date = #{date} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM register WHERE pay_status = #{payStatus} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO register ( patient_id, patient_name, patient_phone, id_card, department_id, department_name, physician_id, physician_name, scheduling_id, visit_date, visit_time, complaint, status, register_type, regist_level_id, regist_level_name, amount, pay_status, pay_method, ai_triage_result, ai_pre_visit, operator_id, operator_name, remark ) VALUES ( #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{patientPhone}, #{idCard}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentName}, #{physicianId}, #{physicianName}, #{schedulingId}, #{visitDate}, #{visitTime}, #{complaint}, #{status}, #{registerType}, #{registLevelId}, #{registLevelName}, #{amount}, #{payStatus}, #{payMethod}, #{aiTriageResult}, #{aiPreVisit}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE register SET patient_name = #{patientName}, patient_phone = #{patientPhone}, department_id = #{departmentId}, department_name = #{departmentName}, physician_id = #{physicianId}, physician_name = #{physicianName}, complaint = #{complaint}, status = #{status}, pay_status = #{payStatus}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET pay_status = #{payStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
